jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Radiologist at Indraprastha Apollo
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Indraprastha Apollo. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Radiologist to strengthen our Jodhpur-based team.

About Indraprastha Apollo:
Indraprastha Apollo is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Coding

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Indraprastha Apollo!
